tasks.label: Commit Changes
tasks.command: git add . && git commit -m "Revert to last working run"

tasks.command: git add . && git commit -m 'Revert to last working run'

tasks.label: Commit Changes
tasks.command: git add . ; git commit -m 'Revert to last working run'

tasks.command: git commit -m "Revert to last working run"

tasks.label: Commit
tasks.command: git commit -m `"Revert to last working run`"

tasks.label: Commit with message
tasks.command: echo 'Revert to last working run' | git commit -F -
